cross-text synthesis of the main evaluation sources and when each should lead. ::: ::: {.section-card} Synthesis ### [Magenta Book Model Alignment](notes/magenta-book-evaluation-model-alignment.qmd) How the Magenta Book compares with CIPP, Rossi/Lipsey/Freeman, utilization-focused evaluation, and related models. ::: ::: {.section-card} Synthesis ### [Is a Theory of Change Needed?](notes/theory-of-change-needed-in-evaluation.qmd) When evaluation needs a theory of change, when a lighter model is enough, and when theory work becomes performative. ::: ::: ::: ::: {.directory-section} ## Evaluation Texts ::: {.section-grid book-grid} ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Purposeful Program Theory](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd) Theories of change, theories of action, logic models, assumptions, and causal inference for program theory use. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Practical Program Evaluation](notes/practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd) A practice-oriented guide to matching evaluation types, program stages, logic models, and program theory. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](notes/qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/index.qmd) Qualitative inquiry for evaluation questions where context, meaning, process, and use matter. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Realistic Evaluation](notes/realistic-evaluation/index.qmd) A realist approach to explaining what works, for whom, in what circumstances, and why. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Impact Evaluation in Practice](notes/impact-evaluation-in-practice/index.qmd) Impact evaluation design around theory of change, counterfactuals, questions, methods, data, and implementation timing. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](notes/handbook-practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd) A broad handbook on evaluation planning, stakeholder engagement, monitoring, study designs, and use. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](notes/evaluation-systematic-approach/index.qmd) A systematic evaluation framework covering questions, needs, theory, process, impact, efficiency, and use. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](notes/essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/index.qmd) A compact guide to designing evaluations for primary intended users and actual use. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Magenta Book](notes/magenta-book/index.qmd) UK central government guidance on evaluation scoping, methods, data, management, dissemination, and capability. ::: ::: {.section-card} Book notes ### [Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](notes/evaluation-theory-models-applications/index.qmd) A survey and assessment of evaluation theory, models, standards, CIPP, metaevaluation, and applications. ::: ::: :::
